title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Infosys is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
